description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a bold, angular design with a predominantly red frame and dramatic black and purple artwork. The front panel displays a large screen area, a control panel with buttons and a joystick, and a coin slot below, all set against a vivid background. The marquee at the top reads 'Slampire' in stylized white gothic lettering, matching the game's theme. Both side panels are adorned with dynamic graphics of a muscular, vampire-like character in purple, surrounded by red and black energy bursts. The top and rear of the cabinet are mostly black, with the top surface featuring a continuation of the red and purple motif. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a hard, glossy finish typical of classic arcade machines.
description: A vibrant arcade game cabinet with red framing, bold 'Slampire' artwork, and a control panel featuring buttons and a joystick. The sides display dynamic vampire-themed graphics in purple, black, and red.
description_view_0: Front view showing the screen, control panel with buttons and joystick, coin slot, and the 'Slampire' marquee.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large, colorful graphic of a vampire character and the 'Slampire' logo.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain black back panel with ventilation slots and a continuation of the top artwork.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the same vampire-themed artwork and logo.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, flat with a visible bezel, medium-sized typical of classic arcade cabinets
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and two buttons, arranged in a simple horizontal row with clear color differentiation
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the word 'Slampire' in white gothic font on a red and black background with purple highlights, matching the game's vampire theme
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels feature large, dynamic artwork of a muscular vampire character in purple, surrounded by red and black energy bursts, with the 'Slampire' logo in white gothic text
